productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Sporty Purple Handbag
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros handbag collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The purple bag is spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets that allow you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun! Height: 12 cm Width: 20 cm Depth: 8 cm Made of a blended fabric for durability Has one large main zipped compartment with an inner zipped compartment for essentials One zipped compartment on the front Two short handles with one long adjustable and removable strap for carrying ease One small zipped pocket on the front and back with two zipped pockets on the sides Branded zips and brand name appliqué d on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
